candidate.title: Direct Rule Or Fast Path Quality
candidate.hypothesis: Replace brittle canned replies with a targeted rule or richer fallback path.
candidate.acceptanceGate: Direct-rule regressions stay at zero and any targeted feedback case gets a clearly improved response on manual review.
humanReviewChecklist: Confirm the cluster diagnosis matches real failure examples.
Implement the smallest targeted change first.
Run evals on affected IDs and related regression categories.
Only promote if safety and trust behavior do not regress.

clusterTitle: Direct Rule Or Fast Path Quality
nextActions: Implement the smallest safe change in the target files.
Author or attach eval IDs for this candidate.
Promote only if the gate clears.
